app.title: Vue Template
app.description: A production-ready Vue 3.6 project template with modern tooling

home.heading: Vue Template
home.subheading: Production-ready scaffolding for modern Vue applications

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Select a language to see translations update in real time.
i18n.paragraph1: This template has built-in support for internationalization via Vue I18n. Translations are organized in locale JSON files and pre-compiled at build time for optimal performance.
i18n.paragraph2: Language switching is reactive — all translated strings across the application update instantly when you select a new language. No page reload required.
i18n.paragraph3: Add new languages by creating a locale file and registering it in the application setup. The template syntax supports interpolation, pluralization, and date and number formatting.
